description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 첨단 컴퓨팅의 교차점을 탐구하는 프로젝트로, 합성 생물학과 디지털 아키텍처가 결합된 FLORA-9 표본을 시각화합니다.
description.en: A conceptual exploration of the intersection between organic botany and advanced computing, featuring the FLORA-9 specimen where synthetic biology meets digital architecture.

prompt: Hyper-realistic 8k render of a futuristic digital plant, FLORA-9, featuring glowing bioluminescent neon blue and violet fiber-optic petals, circuit board patterns etched onto translucent crystalline leaves, microscopic data particles floating like pollen, dark futuristic laboratory environment, cinematic lighting, macro photography, unreal engine 5 style.
